name: Cottage Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt; set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the pumpkin, milk, and orange zest.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Gently stir in the chopped fruits.
6. Spoon the batter into prepared 2 1/2-inch muffin cups, filling them about three-quarters full.
7. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the pans immediately and cool on wire racks.
9. Drizzle frosting over the cooled cakes. Makes 20 small cakes.
